records.ety: [L. inter, prep., among, between, a compar. form of in in; akin to intra, intro, within, Skr. antar between, in, and E. in. See In, and cf. Entrails, Interior, Enter-, Exterior.]

defs: A prefix signifying among, between, amid; as, interact, interarticular, intermit.

records.ety: [OE. enteren, OF. enterer, enterrer, LL. interrare; L. pref. in- in + terra the earth. See Terrace.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Interred (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Interring (?).]

defs: To deposit and cover in the earth; to bury; to inhume; as, to inter a dead body.
